raw_consumer_statement: Hello All items in this order were returned. This is regarding dispute XXXX which has remained open for an incredibly long time for no reason. It says waiting for merchant response but Ive been speaking with them ( the merchant ) erveryday and they keep changing their story and making up lies. American Express cant be waiting for a merchant response because Ive communicated with the merchant many times and they respond in less than a day. Ive provide all evidence the items were returned using the companys prepaid return label yet American Express has kept the dispute open unlike any other dispute before because they are targeting me due to my race ( XXXX ).
